creator: waitman@waitman.net
text:
Sorry about that. That patch was removed because it was no longer needed due to upstream update. 

I believe I followed the instructions at https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/porting-submitting.html

for creating svn diff, but it looks like it didn't "Remove" the file from files/
